title: Fetching with JavaScript
description: Learn how to use the JavaScript Fetch API to request data from APIs on the web.

home.heroSubtitle: Learn how to request and use data from APIs using the JavaScript Fetch API.

blocks.content:
In this module you will learn how web applications communicate with servers to retrieve data. You will start with the fundamentals — what JSON is and how APIs work — then progress to writing real `fetch` requests, handling errors, and working with collections of data.

Use the sidebar to navigate between topics, or browse the pages below to get started.
